job_description:
• Manage and direct a team of experienced games/graphics engineers.
• Stay informed of software and hardware trends and innovations, especially pertaining to algorithms and architecture Debugging/fix existing issues and research alternative, more efficient ways to accomplish the same work Develop technical relationships with peers and partners Computer science background with advanced years of full-time experience writing efficient, modern C++ and high-level shader code (HLSL SM6, GLSL, Slang, etc)Motivating leader with good interpersonal skills Effective communication and problem-solving skillsKnowledge of real-time rendering and graphics algorithms as used in AAA games.
• Highly organized and experienced at planning development schedules, including adapting to changing requirementsExtensive experience shipping AAA games & game-engines or middleware.
• Excellent written and verbal English skills.
• Bachelor’s or Master's degree in Computer Science, Computer Engineering, Electrical Engineering, or equivalent AMD Partner Hub Authorized Distributors AMD University Program Investor Relations Financial Information Board of Directors Governance Documents SEC Filings.
• Define and manage project schedules and deliverablesWork closely with research engineers to transform proof-of-concept prototypes into mature products at a very high level of quality.
• Collaborate with external game development partners to integrate these technologies into their titles.
• Optimize, extend, package and document high-level compute shader and C++ code.
